## Package release checklist

If this PR changes files under `packages/*`:

- [ ] Added a changeset with `npx changeset add`.
- [ ] If no package release is needed, added an empty changeset with `npx changeset add --empty` and explained why here.
- [ ] If the PR references an issue, used `Refs #ISSUE` instead of `Closes/Fixes/Resolves #ISSUE`.
- [ ] If the PR has `Refs #ISSUE`, included the same `Refs #ISSUE` in the changeset body so changelog-driven issue closure works after publish.
